questions.question:
A projected volume diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `projected-volume-brief` already exists in namespace `projectedvolume-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `bundle-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment bundle-api -n projectedvolume-lab -o wide`
- `configMapNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment bundle-api -n projectedvolume-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].projected.sources[0].configMap.name}'`
- `configMapItemPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment bundle-api -n projectedvolume-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].projected.sources[0].configMap.items[0].path}'`
- `secretNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment bundle-api -n projectedvolume-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].projected.sources[1].secret.name}'`
- `secretItemPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment bundle-api -n projectedvolume-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].projected.sources[1].secret.items[0].path}'`
- `mountPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment bundle-api -n projectedvolume-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `readOnlyCheck` is `kubectl get deployment bundle-api -n projectedvolume-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].readOnly}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n projectedvolume-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm projected sources, item paths, and readOnly mount before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q2501/projected-volume-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q2501/projected-volume-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Projected Volume Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live ConfigMap, Secret, or Deployment during this drill.

verification.description: The projected volume diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, exact projected source inspection commands, event evidence, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact projected ConfigMap, Secret, and mount inspection commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe projected-volume remediation guidance is removed
